cells.p:
Min F over obs
you make happen.

slides.label: what-changes
slides.headline:
No separation
perception/action.
slides.sub:
No reward function.
No exp/exploit tuning.
No overfitting.
slides.coral:
Preferences live in C.
Curiosity falls out.
Complexity is free.

slides.label: one-place
slides.headline:
A single place
to stand.
slides.sub:
The world you perceive.
The actions you take.
